summary: Implements repair-exhaustion question flow with state signals, question builder, routing/workflow integration, and answer handling; unit tests and CI pass.

requirement_checks.requirement: Repair exhaustion posts a decision question instead of only blocking.
evidence: scripts/handle-stage-failure.mjs: branches to buildRepairExhaustionQuestion when repair state indicates exhaustion and sets FACTORY_INTERVENTION/FACTORY_COMMENT.
tests/handle-stage-failure.test.mjs: test 'main emits repair exhaustion question' asserts a question intervention is produced.

requirement_checks.requirement: The question is posted in the PR comment stream with bounded answer commands.
evidence: scripts/raise-repair-exhaustion-question.mjs: applies the question payload via apply-pr-state by setting FACTORY_INTERVENTION and FACTORY_COMMENT.
.github/workflows/factory-pr-loop.yml: new job 'repair-exhaustion-question' invokes the raise script when routed outputs include a repair question.
tests/raise-repair-exhaustion-question.test.mjs: verifies apply-pr-state invocation and env payload for raising the question.

requirement_checks.requirement: A valid answer updates PR metadata correctly and drives the intended next action (retry, reset, or human takeover).
evidence: scripts/apply-intervention-answer.mjs: recognizes 'reset_to_plan_ready', clears intervention, sets FACTORY_STATUS=plan_ready and FACTORY_REPAIR_ATTEMPTS=0; handles resume_current_stage and manual takeover paths.
tests/apply-intervention-answer.test.mjs: contains tests for resetting to plan-ready, persisting ambiguity pending decisions, resuming, and human takeover behavior.

requirement_checks.requirement: Non-exhausted repair failures continue to surface the legacy failure intervention (no question).
evidence: scripts/lib/event-router.mjs: routeWorkflowRun and routePullRequestReview return a normal 'repair' action when nextRepairState().blocked is false.
tests/event-router.test.mjs: tests validate repair routing for non-blocked states and show exhausted blocking only when expected.

requirement_checks.requirement: Add repair-state 'exhaustedBy' signal, repair-interventions helper, route/workflow outputs, ws job to raise question, and answer handler support (reset_to_plan_ready).
evidence: scripts/lib/repair-interventions.mjs: implements buildRepairExhaustionQuestion() and resumeContext composition.
scripts/route-pr-loop.mjs & scripts/lib/event-router.mjs: emit repair_question_intervention, repair_question_comment, and repair_exhaustion_reason outputs.
scripts/raise-repair-exhaustion-question.mjs & .github/workflows/factory-pr-loop.yml: workflow job added to call the raise script when a question payload is present.
scripts/apply-intervention-answer.mjs: supports reset_to_plan_ready and clears repair counters; tests updated accordingly.

requirement_checks.requirement: Unit tests updated/added to cover new behavior: repair-state, repair-interventions builder, stage-failure question path, raise script, and answer handling.
evidence: tests/repair-state.test.mjs: asserts exhaustedBy values for attempt_limit and repeated_failure.
tests/repair-interventions.test.mjs: exercises summary and resumeContext produced by the builder.
tests/handle-stage-failure.test.mjs, tests/raise-repair-exhaustion-question.test.mjs, tests/apply-intervention-answer.test.mjs: cover end-to-end branching for question creation and answer handling.

findings.title: No workflow-level integration smoke test
findings.details: Unit tests cover the new builder, routing, stage-failure logic, raise script, and answer handling, but there is no end-to-end workflow-level test that executes the 'repair-exhaustion-question' job path across the route->reroute->raise job boundary.
findings.recommendation: Add a lightweight integration test or GitHub Actions smoke job (in CI or a dedicated workflow test) that simulates a failing workflow_run and verifies the 'repair-exhaustion-question' job invokes the raise script and applies the intervention payload.

findings.title: Operator discoverability: document new intervention semantics
findings.details: The new 'repair_exhaustion' questionKind and the 'reset_to_plan_ready' option are implemented and surfaced, but contributor/operator docs don't currently call out these new options explicitly.
findings.recommendation: Add a short note to the contributor docs or PR description explaining the new question type and answer commands so operators learn to use '/factory answer <id> <option-id>' for repair exhaustion cases.
